texto: For some reason, the despair that's welling up in me is transforming into white-hot rage. I feel it working its way up from my toes, winding around my legs, and burrowing into the pit of my stomach. It spears its razor-sharp tendrils through the pieces of my broken heart. It's crippling, and devastating, and unrelenting. I have only one choice to survive this; I turn that rage outward.
explicacao: Citação de Michelle Figley sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “For some reason, the despair that's welling up in me is transforming into white-hot rage. I feel …” articula amor, heartbreak, romance-novels em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e termino.
